text_block_list.text:
I happen to spot Special Week and Seiun Sky
walking together one day.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you headed to karaoke too, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
We're off to get some intense practice in at
karaoke!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Since there's no training today, we figured we'd
practice for our winning concerts instead!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
We were gonna grab burgers, but then Spe
suddenly said food's off the table...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Maybe she's worried about her wei—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Say! You know what's really on my mind?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
How we should practice our singing for everyone
out there cheering us on!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh, sure. Let's go with that.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Actually... Trainer, why don't you come with us?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure that supporting us with winning
concerts is part of your duties too.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It'd be great to have you with us! Then you can
give us feedback!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yaaay! Thank you so much! Now I'm really fired
up!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Good job, Trainer. You gotta make sure you take
good care of your racer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Clear, bri—nanana—for a lovely race... Clear,
bright... somethin' somethin'... ♪ Ack.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The karaoke machine lets you slow down the
song's tempo, so how about starting at a slower
speed?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oooh, that's a great idea!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
While you're doing that, I'm gonna order some
food.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What?! You're ordering food?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm starving! I came out expecting to eat,
but here I am at karaoke.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Now what should I get? I think I'll have some
pizza, fried chicken, cheeseburgers, carrot
sticks...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Drool...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Spe, you don't have to be so harsh on yourself,
y'know...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sure, it's important to maintain a healthy weight,
but it's also important to eat tasty things and get
the nutrients you need.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
B-but I have to maintain my body weight for
racing...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And I wanna show my fans my gratitude with a
great performance after the race too...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: This is where you come in, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Spe's trying to do her best for her fans by going
to extreme lengths and skipping meals.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, I'm here wanting to eat tasty burgers
and carrots.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: What do you think Spe should do?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer...
choice_data_list:
For everyone's sake and for your own, get some
energy!

For everyone's sake and for your own,
strengthen your resolve!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You're right... Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I have to nourish myself so I can do my best for
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hand me that menu, Sei! I've gotta get me some
nutrients!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Have at it! Order whatever you want! We've got a
chaperone to pay for us, after all!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ♪ Maybe? Who knows.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
In any case, all's well that ends well for Spe.
Thanks to you, Trainer.

And so, the three of us enjoy our time at karaoke
with some tasty food.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, you're right! Everyone cheers me on
because of how hard I work!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I've gotta strengthen my resolve and get
through this with sheer willpower!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I see... I guess I'll forget about eating too, then.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You're clearly devoted, Spe, so let's crank the
intensity of this practice session to the max!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Why?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
No time to coast by on easy mode! Put the tempo
back to normal!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, ma'am!

And so, the three of us enjoy karaoke while they
practice for their winning concerts.
